arts.ttl: Celtic to face Raith Rovers in Scottish Cup fifth-round as treble hunt continues
arts.sum: Celtic will take on Raith Rovers at Parkhead in the fifth round of the Scottish Cup.

arts.ttl: Bilingual Young Boys boss with A list Champions League references aiming to leave Celtic tongue tied
arts.sum: Young Boys make the trip to Parkhead in the penultimate round of the Champions League group phase on Wednesday night

arts.ttl: Celtic need biggest Champions League performance yet against Young Boys as Arne Engels makes Leipzig level demand
arts.sum: Swiss strugglers arrive in Glasgow without a point but Engels knows Celtic will need to be at the top of their game.

arts.ttl: Leaders Gorey Rangers edge out local rivals Celtic in Under-19 clash
arts.sum: Alex Devereux helped himself to four goals as Gorey Rangers extended their advantage at the top of Youths Division 5 to six points with a comprehensive 6-0 triumph against Forth Celtic at Altura Credit Union Park on Saturday. Oisín O’Leary restored Bunclody’s advantage on the hour mark, but again Bree had the answer, and Sludds grabbed his second six minutes later.

arts.ttl: Celtic told what would happen to Greg Taylor if Kieran Tierney joined from Arsenal in January
arts.sum: Celtic told Greg Taylor will leave if Kieran Tierney joins from Arsenal Taylor’s contract situation has been a big talking point and Allan thinks Tierney will start if he joins, as he told Clyde 1 Superscorboard.
